xwikidoc.name: ConfluenceMacroDocumentationClassSheet
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} #macro (renderMaybeLink $page $anchor $url $content) #if ($url == '-' || $url == '?' || $url == '') #set ($link = $page) #if ("$!anchor" != '') #set ($link = "$link||anchor='$anchor'") #end## #elseif ($url.startsWith('http')) #set ($link = "url:$url") #else #set ($link = '') #end #if ($link != '') [[$content>>$link]]## #else $content## #end #end ## #set ($className = 'DocApp.Code.Confluence.ConfluenceMacroDocumentationClass') #set ($macroObj = $doc.getObject($className)) #set ($confluenceId = $macroObj.confluenceId) #if ("$!confluenceId" != '') #set($queryStr = 'from doc.object(DocApp.Code.Confluence.ConfluenceMacroDocumentationClass) obj where obj.confluenceId = :confluenceId and doc.fullName <> :currentDocFullname') #set($res = $services.query.xwql($queryStr).bindValue('confluenceId', $confluenceId).bindValue('currentDocFullname', $doc.fullName).execute()) #if ($res.size() > 0) {{warning}} It seems that this macro is also documented elsewhere: #foreach ($i in $res) * [[$services.rendering.escape($services.rendering.escape($i, 'xwiki/2.1'), 'xwiki/2.1')>>$i]] #end {{/warning}} #end #end #if ($macroObj != $NULL) #set($class = $macroObj.xWikiClass) #if ($xcontext.action == 'edit') (% class="xform" %) ((( #foreach($property in $class.properties) ; {{html clean="false"}} $!property.hint {{/html}} : $doc.display($property.name) #end ))) #else #set ($importSupportQualifier = $macroObj.getValue('importSupportQualifier')) #if ($importSupportQualifier == 'partial') {{warning}} The import of this macro may be incomplete. {{/warning}} #elseif ($importSupportQualifier == 'no') {{error}} The import of this macro is not supported: important features will be missing. {{/error}} #end #set ($functionalEquivalenceQualifier = $macroObj.getValue('functionalEquivalenceQualifier')) #if ($functionalEquivalenceQualifier == 'partial') {{warning}} This macro's equivalent feature in XWiki may lack features. {{/warning}} #elseif ($functionalEquivalenceQualifier == 'no') {{error}} Important features will be missing in XWiki's equivalent feature. {{/error}} #end Confluence macro ## #set ($confluenceURL = $macroObj.getValue('confluenceURL')) #renderMaybeLink('' '' $confluenceURL, "{{code language='none'}}$confluenceId{{/code}}") ## #set ($handling = $macroObj.getValue('handling')) #set ($xwikiId = $macroObj.getValue('xwikiId')) #set ($xwikiURL = $macroObj.getValue('xwikiURL')) #set ($xwikiPage = $macroObj.getValue('xwikiPage')) #set ($xwikiPageAnchor = $macroObj.getValue('xwikiPageAnchor')) #if ($handling.startsWith('conversion')) #if ($handling == 'conversionToSyntax' || "$!xwikiId" == '') #set ($xwikiIdContent = 'some syntax') ## #else #set ($xwikiIdContent = "macro {{code language='none'}}$xwikiId{{/code}}") ## #end is converted to ## #renderMaybeLink($xwikiPage, $xwikiPageAnchor, $xwikiURL, $xwikiIdContent) ## #elseif ($handling == 'bridge') is covered by the ## #renderMaybeLink($xwikiPage, $xwikiPageAnchor, $xwikiURL, "{{code language}}$xwikiId{{/code}} bridge macro") ## #elseif ($handling == 'direct') is imported ## #renderMaybeLink($xwikiPage, $xwikiPageAnchor, $xwikiURL, 'as-is') ## #elseif ($handling == 'drop') is dropped## #else uses ## #renderMaybeLink($xwikiPage, $xwikiPageAnchor, $xwikiURL, $handling) ## #end## #if ($handling != 'drop') #set ($requiredForUsageURL = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForUsage')) #set ($requiredForUsageName = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForUsageName')) #if (("$!requiredForUsageName" == '' && "$!requiredForUsageURL" == '') || $requiredForUsageName == 'XWiki Standard') which a standard installation of XWiki provides## #elseif ("$!requiredForUsageName" != '') #set ($escapedUsageName = $services.rendering.escape($requiredForUsageName, 'xwiki/2.1')) #if ("$!requiredForUsageURL" == '') which requires $escapedUsageName## #else which requires [[$services.rendering.escape($escapedUsageName, 'xwiki/2.1')>>$requiredForUsageURL]]## #end #else #set ($requiredForUsageId = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForUsageId')) #set ($requiredForUsageContent = $requiredForUsageId) #if ("$!requiredForUsageContent" == '') #set ($requiredForUsageContent = 'this') #end which requires ## #set ($requiredForUsagePage = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForUsagePage')) #set ($requiredForUsagePageAnchor = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForUsagePageAnchor')) #renderMaybeLink($requiredForUsagePage, $requiredForUsagePageAnchor, $requiredForUsage, "package {{code language='none'}}$requiredForUsageId{{/code}}")## #end #end. #set ($requiredForImport = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForImport')) #set ($requiredForImportPage = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForImportPage')) #set ($requiredForImportPageAnchor = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForImportPageAnchor')) #set ($requiredForImportId = $macroObj.getValue('requiredForImportId')) #if ("$!requiredForImportId" == '') #if ("$!requiredForImport" != '') Importing this macro requires $doc.display('requiredForImport'). ## #end #elseif ($requiredForImportId == 'org.xwiki.contrib.confluence:confluence-xml' || $requiredForImportId == 'com.xwiki.confluence:confluence-migration-package-ui') Importing this macro doesn't requires anything specific apart from the standard migration tools. ## #else Importing this macro requires ## #renderMaybeLink($requiredForImportPage, $requiredForImportPageAnchor, $requiredForImport, "package {{code language='none'}}$requiredForImportId{{/code}}"). ## #end #set ($equivXWikiFeatureURL = $macroObj.getValue('equivXWikiFeatureURL')) #set ($equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor = $macroObj.getValue('equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor')) #if ("$!equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor" != '') #set ($equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor = $equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor + '||anchor="anchor"')' #end #set ($equivXWikiFeaturePage = $macroObj.getValue('equivXWikiFeaturePage')) #set ($correspondingXWikiFeature = $macroObj.getValue('correspondingXWikiFeature')) #if ("$!equivXWikiFeatureURL" != '' || "$!correspondingXWikiFeature" != '') == What to use in XWiki {{html clean="false"}}
$xwiki.getClass($className).get('correspondingXWikiFeature').hint
{{/html}} $doc.display('correspondingXWikiFeature') #if ("$!equivXWikiFeaturePage" != '') #if ("$!equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor" == '') See [[$equivXWikiFeaturePage]] #else See [[$equivXWikiFeaturePage||anchor="$equivXWikiFeaturePageAnchor"]] #end #elseif ("$!equivXWikiFeatureURL" != '' && $equivXWikiFeatureURL != '?' && $equivXWikiFeatureURL != '-') See $doc.display('equivXWikiFeatureURL') #end #end #set ($handlingDetails = $macroObj.getValue('handlingDetails')) #if ("$!handlingDetails" != '') == Import details == {{html clean="false"}}
$xwiki.getClass($className).get('handlingDetails').hint
{{/html}} $doc.display('handlingDetails') #end #if ("$!doc.content" != '') == Additional information == $doc.display('content1') #end #end #end {{/velocity}}
